title: ServiceBinding
description: Authoritative endpoint→capability bindings for a service, authored by a maintainer or service owner. Applied at index build / enrich-facets time to OVERRIDE the heuristic binder for the listed endpoints. The minimal, certain core of a contributed service's curation: endpoint identity + capability ids (richer per-endpoint facets/price come later).

note.description: Why this binding exists (e.g. fixing a heuristic mis-bind).

capabilities.description: The complete, authoritative set of capability ids this endpoint satisfies (replaces the heuristic binding for this endpoint).
